sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_time) VALUES (1, timestamp '2021-08-03 11:59:44.123456');
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = event_time + interval '1 hour' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, hour(event_time) AS event_hour FROM test_dates;
SELECT id FROM test_dates WHERE hour(event_time) BETWEEN 8 AND 17;
